name: bloom_filter_membership
notes: mBits=64, kHashes=3. Hash scheme (must match bit-for-bit across languages): h1 = FNV-1a-32(item); h2 = FNV-1a-32('\u0000' + item); index_i = (h1 + i*h2) mod m for i in [0,k). Added items always report true (no false negatives); the not-added probes below were confirmed to land on unset bits for this exact (m,k) pair and item set.
